raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"travel_advice","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"The best time to visit Bali for surfing is during the dry season, which is from April to October.","distilled_fact":"The best time to visit Bali for surfing is during the dry season from April to October."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"travel_advice","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"During this time, the waves are consistent and the winds are favorable for surfing.","distilled_fact":"During the dry season from April to October in Bali, the waves are consistent and the winds are favorable for surfing."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"travel_advice","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"For beginners, some of the recommended beaches are Kuta Beach, Legian Beach, and Seminyak Beach.","distilled_fact":"For beginners, the recommended beaches in Bali are Kuta Beach, Legian Beach, and Seminyak Beach."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"travel_advice","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"These beaches have small to medium-sized waves and are suitable for learning how to surf.","distilled_fact":"Kuta Beach, Legian Beach, and Seminyak Beach have small to medium-sized waves and are suitable for learning how to surf."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"travel_advice","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"There are also many surf schools and instructors available to help beginners get started.","distilled_fact":"There are many surf schools and instructors available in Bali to help beginners get started."}]}
